package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for cors_allow_all_origins: `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` combined with `Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true`, or CORS middleware configured with `AllowAllOrigins: true` in Gin/Echo/Chi
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario704Positive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	value := r.FormValue("input")
	w.Header().Set("X-Scenario", value)
}
